2004-05-31‚ÄéWell I'm back.  Sorry for no update last night
column2: I was really worn out.  We swam and stuff.  We catapulted my cousin Jessie off the back of a trailer.  That was pretty much it.
I'm going to my aunt's for a cookout.  Apparently
column3: the pool is too dirty/filled with chemicals/my uncle is too lazy for us to swim.  Knowing all of us
column4: we'll suffer the chemical burns just for the cheap thrill of swimming.  And of course
column5: we'll play kick the can in the pool barn and I'll be hiding in the best spot ever and then I'll suddenly see a huge spider and scream ""OH GOD THAT SPIDER IS HUGE"" and be ""it"".  That's how it goes.  And of course my little cousin Jessie will get yelled at for some reason (like he always does).  And my other cousin will start pouting because she's it
column6: and I'll eat WAY too much
column7: and some other funny thing will happen.  Which reminds me of a story.   Well
column8: it was when I was about 9 or 10
column9: and there was a big storm so we had to go inside.  So my cousin Dan and I are sitting in some bedroom
column10: looking out the window at some other members of my family who were outside
column11: when my cousin Sherri (who we all used to hate for some reason) runs across the cement with her hands up
column12: and we see this flash of lightning that looks as though it hit her.  We were out for like 10 minutes cracking up.  It sounds evil and mean
